description: Push/pull camera path presets -- slow_push_forward (camera moves from z=5 toward z=-3, creating the 'moving into the scene' effect) and slow_pull_back (reverse). Mathematical mirrors with swapped start/end positions; one spec covers both. The defining 2.5D motion per Section 4.3. Defines position(t), lookAt(t), easing defaults, compatible geometries, and direction-dependent oversizing requirements.
notes: Tier 2 camera path. The most important camera motion for 2.5D projection. Spec deliberation resolved: direction-dependent oversize factors (push=1.0, pull=1.7), symmetric-easing-only mirror relationship, pure Z-axis motion with fixed lookAt at [0,0,-30].
